value.rationale: The claim concerns Google Antigravity (the agentic IDE/platform). The page is a Google AI Developers Forum category dedicated entirely to "Google Antigravity," with numerous topics about Antigravity IDE 2.0, agents running terminal commands, quotas, models, etc. This substantiates that Google offers/provides Antigravity as an active product. However, the page does not mention the specific "sandbox" security setting, throttling network access, or prompt-injection vulnerability details described in the claim — those specifics are not present on the page. The core offering (Google Antigravity) is clearly described, so the existence of the offering is supported, but the security-feature specifics are not corroborated here.
